body: ## Summary Overhauls the soil biogeochemistry / ecosystem-respiration pathway: fixes NaNs in global SoilCO2 runs, switches to Henry's-law air–water partitioning, initialize SOC with SoilGrids data, recalibrates against GPP + ER + NEE + LHF, and adds ER and NEE to the leaderboard. ## Highlights - **No more NaNs** — `O2_f` clamped to [0, 0.21] each step + CFL-aware tendency limiter when `Δt > 0`. `Δt` is now a required positional arg on `SoilCO2Model{FT}` so the limiter can't be silently skipped. - **Henry's-law air–water partitioning** (Sander 2015) for CO2 and O2: `θ_eff = max(θ_a + β·θ_l, θ_eff,min)` stays bounded as the soil saturates. - **DAMM Arrhenius in centered form** — `V_ref` and `Ea` are orthogonal under calibration; T response reduces to a slope (~Q10) + intercept. - **SOC from SoilGrids** instead of uniform constant; pool held fixed in time but kept prognostic for future dynamic SOC. - **CO2 IC** in equilibrium with atmospheric `c_co2` via Henry's law; **O2 IC** exponential profile (0.21 surface → 0.15 at -1 m). - **New calibration config** `gpp_er_nee_lhf.jl` (11 parameters). Defaults in `toml/default_parameters.toml` updated to the latest 8th-iteration posterior mean. - **Leaderboard** now includes ILAMB FLUXCOM ER and NEE. - **[Updated docs](https://clima.github.io/ClimaLand.jl/previews/PR1714/standalone/pages/soil/biogeochemistry/DAMM_model/)**. ## Next PR Calibrate against a NEE dataset reproducing atmospheric CO2 (inversion dataset?), with a loss capturing (1) seasonality, (2) inter-annual variability, and (3) the decadal trend (land sink keeping up with rising emissions). Relies on human emissions and ocean sinks being known. ---
title: Respiration update

body: This commit also updates the ClimaAnalysis version, because `make_ocean_masked_annual_timeseries` uses functionality that is not in ClimaAnalysis v0.5.17.
title: Check for monthly data in annual time series

body:
closes https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaLand.jl/issues/1737

This PR is identical to https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/pull/1722 and https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl/pull/4287. There is a concurrency limit of 5 MacOS runners for the entire organization.
title: Use MacOS runners only on PR merges
